# Change Shipping Address

In order management, users can edit the shipping address until the order enters the packing stage, at which point the address becomes fixed. If a change is necessary after this stage, it may be possible for customer support to intercept the package with the carrier for a fee of five dollars, but such interceptions are not guaranteed once the parcel is in transit.

[Source: order_management.md#change-shipping-address]
